target:
Message?
It's fine if you just do it normally.

It's not that…
Um… I guess I might not be able to contact for a while.
I see, then I'll stop contacting you--
It's okay if you send me messages, Shinpei!
Huh? But you said you were busy…
That's… how do I say it…

Thank you.
When things settle down, I'll contact you.

Welcome back, Shin-chan!!
Long trip, you're exhausted, right?!

(Deja vu…
That's what they mean by that, right?)

Ahaha…!
Sorry Shin-chan, I scared you!

I just got sweaty…
I thought I'd take a swim!

(When she jumped in earlier…
Her underwear was the same)
Mio, did you actually apply the brakes?

I don't know why…
I thought I applied them properly,
but they didn't work.

(If the brakes didn't work…
Was it a bicycle malfunction?)

(The brake wire is broken?
That's why they wouldn't work…)

(It doesn't look like it broke naturally.
Who in the world did this…)
(Anyway, I should pull her out first)

Come on, climb up.
I'll help you.

Are you okay?
Good you aren't hurt.
I didn't forget! I'm remembering now…

It's unavoidable.
We were in different grades.

Oh! Maybe…
You were a classmate of my older sister, Kaori?

Sorry.
It's from when I was little, so I don't remember clearly.

No, it's okay!
I'm the one who should be sorry for making you feel awkward.

Anyway, what are you going to do
with that soaked uniform?
I have a spare uniform at home, so it's fine.

Sorry for the rush.
See you later.
Um… is it okay if I visit to greet you later?

Ah…
Yes, my older sister would be happy.
No, it's just… I feel like I've seen Kaori's face somewhere before.
Well, even if we were in the same school as kids…

I don't get it, but let's go back first.
Alan's waiting, right?
